## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and growth initiatives to increase inbound leads for Firework's enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to generating high-quality inbound marketing qualified leads (MQLs) for enterprise clients, aiming to increase from 40 to 400 monthly.](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Revise content strategy to target enterprise keywords and topics (e.g., unified commerce, in-store experience online) instead of SMB-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Implement a multi-faceted approach: optimize website conversion, improve content relevance, and explore new growth channels beyond SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance Metrics

  - [Approaching 1,000 visitors per week (25% increase from December)](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [115,000 impressions collected last week](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [190 form submissions, including 90 free trial and demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [7 new opportunities created from inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Focus on enterprise-centric topics: unified commerce, connected commerce, in-store experience online, personalization](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Move away from SMB-focused content like shoppable videos, TikTok, and Shopify widgets](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Utilize customer call recordings and transcripts to identify common pain points and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [Fixing conversion funnels to improve lead capture (targeting 1.5-2% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Implementing author profiles for SEO blogs](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Exploring gated content for thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Optimizing demo and free trial pages to reduce friction and increase conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

### Growth Initiatives

  - [Ritesh to own inbound marketing efforts, including SEO](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Jimmy and Prateek to present five growth channels in the next call](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Explore LinkedIn as a potential inbound engine through executive thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### Data-Driven Approach

  - [Analyzing enterprise visitor behavior on the website](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Identifying top-performing blog posts and creating custom lead magnets for each](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Implementing schema markup on blog posts to improve search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ritesh to schedule a meeting with Jimmy and Prateek for a comprehensive business download](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Yi to update the spreadsheet with enterprise visitor page data](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Identify top 5-10 blog posts for creating custom lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Implement website optimizations (sticky bar on mobile, prominent CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [Develop and deploy 3-5 new content strategies using Sam's thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Jimmy and Prateek to prepare growth channel suggestions for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VBwjyNLgjZfyDtMxLod9AgTz_siCtE7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
